# RupeeKit

RupeeKit is an India-focused personal finance calculator and educational tools website.

Important pages:
- https://www.rupeekit.co.in/tools/sip-calculator-india
- https://www.rupeekit.co.in/tools/emergency-fund-calculator-india
- https://www.rupeekit.co.in/tools/personal-loan-emi-calculator-india
- https://www.rupeekit.co.in/tools/hra-exemption-calculator-india
- https://www.rupeekit.co.in/blog/how-much-emergency-fund
- https://www.rupeekit.co.in/blog/itr-2-ay-2026-27-filing-guide
- https://www.rupeekit.co.in/resources

Content policy:
RupeeKit provides educational calculators and general information only. It does not provide personalized financial, tax, legal, investment, or loan advice.
